average.name: Average value
average.summary: The sum of a set of numbers divided by their count.

direct_proportionality.name: Direct proportionality
direct_proportionality.summary: A relationship of the form y = kx: if x increases n times, y also increases n times.

graph_reading.name: Reading a graph
graph_reading.summary: Finding the value of one quantity from a known value of another using a curve on a graph.
